overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a character walking through a futuristic urban plaza beneath a neon-lit overpass, transitioning to an elevated static view of a busy intersection with holographic advertisements and distinctive sci-fi architecture.

events.description: passing a red camping tent and temporary shelter setup on the left side

segments.scene_description: The camera moves forward beneath a massive concrete overpass illuminated by red neon strip lights. The walkway features metal benches, concrete planters with palm trees, and temporary tent shelters. To the right, futuristic glass high-rises rise against the dusk sky, featuring large digital billboards. The atmosphere is that of a cyberpunk urban environment with mixed lighting from artificial neon and fading natural light.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy urban intersection with crosswalks and holographic advertisements

events.description: abrupt cut from ground-level walking to elevated aerial view of intersection
multiple vehicles moving through the intersection in both directions

agents.ego_description: stationary elevated observation of traffic patterns and pedestrian movement at the intersection

notable_agents.action: dark colored sedan driving through the intersection

entered.detail: wide asphalt road with multiple lanes and zebra crosswalk markings
tall thin towers displaying floating holographic advertisements
large metallic dome structure surrounded by trees in the distance
tall dark building with illuminated 07 signage near the top
dry sandy landscape with sparse vegetation bordering the urban area
white striped pedestrian crossing lines on the asphalt
illuminated traffic signals controlling the intersection flow

segments.scene_description: The scene cuts to an elevated aerial view of a busy urban intersection at dusk. Multiple lanes of traffic flow through the crosswalks while pedestrians walk along the sidewalks. In the background, distinctive holographic advertising towers rise beside a large dome-shaped building and a skyscraper marked with 07. The right side of the frame shows desert terrain contrasting with the dense urban development on the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a grounded perspective beneath a neon-lit overpass to an expansive aerial view of a futuristic cityscape. It begins by gliding forward along a walkway lined with metal benches, palm trees, and temporary shelters, all bathed in the red glow of neon strips and the fading light of dusk. As the camera moves past towering glass high-rises and digital billboards, the perspective shifts upward and outward to reveal a sprawling urban intersection. The scene then expands into a wide shot of flowing traffic and pedestrians, framed by holographic advertising towers and a large dome-shaped building. Finally, the view opens further to contrast the dense, high-tech architecture of the city center with the stark, open desert terrain on the horizon.
